title: selaginella darmandvillei
intro: Selaginella darmandvillei, also known as the Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella darmandvillei include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as its potential to improve respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of asthma. In herbal preparations, Selaginella darmandvillei can be found in tea, tincture, or capsule form, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
